headline: Single Stocks Are Driving the Tape – Direxion Launches Four 2X Bull ETFs
summary: 2X Exposure to ADBE, PYPL, TXN, and UNH for Catalyst-Driven Trades Direxion.com Direxion.com New York, New York, March 25, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Direxion, a leading provider of Single Stock Leveraged & Inverse ETFs, today announced the launch of four new ETFs offering 2X daily exposure to Adobe Inc.
